title: Proclamation No. 414, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 414

RESERVING FOR PARK PURPOSES THREE PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF CAVITE, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for park purposes, under the administration of the Province of Cavite, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the poblacion, municipality of Cavite, Province of Cavite, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Pr-229, to wit:

Lot No. 1. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Pr-229, N. 78° 08′ W., 63.52 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, Cavite Cadastre No. 11, thence S. 39° 12′ W. 12.31 m. to point 2; S. 38° 25′ W. 5.36 m. to point 3; S. 15° 20′ W. 6.09 m. to point 4; S. 9° 30′ W. 15.45 m. to point 5; S. 0° 32′ E. 8.42 m. to point 6; N. 78° 27′ W. 2.35 m. to point 7; N. 13° 57′ W. 40.37 m. to point 8; N. 13° 43′ W. 42.45 m. to point 9; S. 87° 47′ E. 2.93 m. to point 10; S. 13° 46′ E. 42.76 m. to point 11; N. 80° 32′ E. 24.51 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 554 square meters.

Point 6, intersection; points 7 and 8, old B. L. concrete monuments; points 9 and 10, corners of base of concrete posts of sea wall; and the rest are B. L. concrete monuments. Bounded on the northeast by property of Cavite Amusement Company; on the east, by property of Cavite Amusement Company and provincial road; on the south and southwest, by lot No. 3; and on the northwest, by Cañacao Bay and property of Cavite Amusement Company.

Lot No, 2. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Pr-229, S. 32° 49′ W. 149 89 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, Cavite Cadastre No. 11, thence S. 62° 04′ W. 62.54 m. to point 2; N. 10° 11′ E. 20.22 m. to point 3; N. 88° 50′ E., 34.73 m. to point 4; N. 70° 30′ E. 22.40 m. to point 5; S. 15° 26′ E. 15.59 m. to point 6; S. 72° 52′ W. 3.46 m, to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 1,022 square meters.

Point 1, B. L. concrete monument; point 2, SE. corner of base of concrete post of sea wall; point 3, intersection; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 3; on the southeast, by provincial road; on the west, by Cañacao Bay; and on the northwest, by lot No. 3.

Lot No. 3. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Pr-229, N. 63° 00′ W. 111.62 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, Cavite cadastre No. 11, thence S. 13° 43′ E. 42.45 m. to point 2; S. 13° 57′ E. 40.37 m. to point 3; S. 78° 27′ E. 2.35 m. to point 4: S. 0° 32′ E. 89.46 m. to point 5; S. 14° 37′ W. 5.47 m. to point 6; N. 15° 26′ W. 15.59 m. to point 7; S. 70° 30′ W. 22.40 m. to point 8; S. 58° 50′ W. 34.73 m. to point 9; N. 10° 11′ E. 189.04 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 5,470 square meters.

Point 1, corner of base of concrete post of sea wall; points 4 and 9, intersections; point 5, B. L. concrete monument; and the rest are old B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 1; on the east, by provincial road; on the southeast and southwest, by lot No. 2; and on the west, by Cañacao Bay.

Bearings true. Declination, 0° 25′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Pr-229.

Surveyed: August 18-19, 1938.

Approved: October 13, 1938.

NOTE.—Lot No. 1 = Lot No. 1300 of Cavite cadastre No. 11, case No. 1.

Lot No. 2 = Lot No. 1301 of Cavite cadastre No. 11, case No. 1.

Lot No. 3 is outside of cadastre.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-third day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
